productDisplayName: Lotto Men Caesar Slide Black Flip Flops
description: Slip into unparalleled comfort in these Caesar Slide flip flops from lotto. With soft straps and a cushioned footbed, this flip flop comes with a stylish upper that makes it a great buy. Upper Soft synthetic leather straps with a twill tape inner lining and toe separator for abrasion-free comfort and to hold the foot in place Padded and textured footbed, ergonomically curved Outsole Durable rubber outsole with branded grooves for absolute grip and traction Flip flop care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
